mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.gender, u.organization_id, u.email, u.password_hash, u.raw_password, u.avatar_icon_id, u.system_admin, o.organization_name, i.component_name AS avatar_icon_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_organization o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_icon i ON i.id = u.avatar_icon_id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.name, u.gender, u.organization_id, u.email, u.password_hash, u.raw_password, u.avatar_icon_id, u.system_admin, o.organization_name, i.component_name AS avatar_icon_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_organization o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_icon i ON i.id = u.avatar_icon_id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, route_name, route_path, component_path, title, icon, sort, admin_only FROM sys_route_permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, created_time ASC

SELECT rp.id, rp.route_name, rp.route_path, rp.component_path, rp.title, rp.icon, rp.sort, rp.admin_only FROM sys_route_permission rp INNER JOIN sys_organization_route_permission orp ON orp.route_permission_id = rp.id AND orp.deleted = 0 WHERE rp.deleted = 0 AND rp.admin_only = 0 AND orp.organization_id = #{organizationId} ORDER BY rp.sort ASC, rp.created_time ASC
